narrative:
Deer Park 2-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 977 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
